reviews.review_description: Revive it bro huge revival chimp tag this year

reviews.review_title: A lot of thought has been put into this
reviews.review_description:
I feel this game is a amazing showcase of how you can make anything. This fan game seems like a passion project. Not just a game. The people that I've seen in the game are really cool. The moderators that I've looked up are cool and I'm thinking I was there for the OG cosmetics. I should maybe start doing content about it

But in conclusion, good game. Lots of bugs and lots of care

Edit: I feel you took a lot of inspiration from capuchin maybe more than you think but I feel if you change some stuff up it would be great

developer_response.body: I took inspiration from some games yes and thank you for the support I don’t get a lot of it.
